jokes.text: Yeah, she's going to apologize to Europe 'cause it's right up there with the bubonic plague and the carpet bombing at Dresden.
jokes.setup: Dan defending the VP's controversial song as lighthearted
jokes.punchline: Comparing it to historical atrocities - bubonic plague and Dresden bombing
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy escalation with historical references - very Dan's character to be this callous and hyperbolic

jokes.text: Ignore Dan. He's hormonal.
jokes.setup: Dan making inflammatory comments
jokes.punchline: Amy dismissing his behavior as hormonal like a moody teenager
jokes.explanation: Sharp character moment - Amy's dry dismissal of Dan's dramatics

jokes.text: Even Mike doesn't want to be like Mike.
jokes.setup: Suggestion to be like Mike
jokes.punchline: Even Mike himself doesn't want to be like Mike
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy and character insight - Mike's self-loathing crystallized in one line

jokes.text: So while she's in Helsinki, just keep her out of Helsinki.
jokes.setup: Need to keep the VP away from regular people while in Helsinki
jokes.punchline: The impossible task of keeping her out of the city she's visiting
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist logic - perfectly captures the impossible nature of political damage control

jokes.text: She gave me a Leviathan with fewer pockets.
jokes.setup: Context of someone complaining
jokes.punchline: Comparing something to a biblical sea monster but focusing on pocket count
jokes.explanation: Wonderfully specific and absurd complaint - mixing biblical references with mundane concerns

jokes.text: Europhobic? Seriously? What is that supposed to mean? I'm scared of subtitles?
jokes.setup: Being called 'Europhobic Khaleesi'
jokes.punchline: Misunderstanding the phobia as fear of subtitles rather than Europe
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina - missing the point while making an accidentally clever observation about European cinema

jokes.text: I do have a summary of the summary that's great.
jokes.setup: Being asked for voter registration summary
jokes.punchline: Only having a summary of the summary instead of actual work
jokes.explanation: Pure Mike incompetence - bureaucratic inefficiency taken to absurd levels

jokes.text: It's fucking insane here. It's like a math prison. They rape you with numbers.
jokes.setup: Dan complaining about work environment
jokes.punchline: Escalating metaphors from prison to sexual assault about numbers
jokes.explanation: Typical Dan hyperbole - characteristically crude and over-dramatic about mundane work

jokes.text: Imminent...al.
jokes.setup: Asked for ETA on voter registration
jokes.punchline: Making up 'imminent-al' as if it's a real word
jokes.explanation: Mike's verbal fumbling - trying to sound professional but making up words

jokes.text: You have to pretend that you're charming. It doesn't matter if the jokes are weak, keep it loose. Deliberately bad jokes. It's kind of genius.
jokes.setup: Dan asking Mike for charm advice
jokes.punchline: Mike's strategy is deliberately bad jokes, which explains his own behavior
jokes.explanation: Meta-comedy gold - Mike unwittingly explaining his own incompetence as a strategy

jokes.text: Deliberately bad jokes. It's kind of genius.
jokes.setup: Mike explaining his press strategy
jokes.punchline: Calling intentionally bad jokes genius
jokes.explanation: Meta commentary on comedy itself while staying in character. Self-aware but not breaking the fourth wall.

jokes.text: J-Rock to come down there and spit some wicked wisdom in your ear
jokes.setup: Mike asking Jonah for help
jokes.punchline: Jonah referring to himself as 'J-Rock' and offering 'wicked wisdom'
jokes.explanation: Classic Jonah delusion - trying to sound cool with awful self-appointed nicknames

jokes.text: Don't worry, buddy. I can cover for you. Remember, I lie for a living. Yeah, but you don't do it well and nobody believes you.
jokes.setup: Mike offering to cover with lies
jokes.punchline: Jonah pointing out Mike is terrible at lying
jokes.explanation: Perfect character dynamics - Mike's incompetence called out by the also-incompetent Jonah

jokes.text: Mate? Yeah, you're a long way from home, mate, too.
jokes.setup: British reporter calling Dan 'mate'
jokes.punchline: Dan's awkward attempt to turn it back on the reporter
jokes.explanation: Weak comeback but characteristic Dan defensiveness

jokes.text: At which point I'll perform a little street magic for you, okay?
jokes.setup: Trying to end press availability
jokes.punchline: Promising to perform street magic instead
jokes.explanation: Absurd deflection tactic - Dan's desperation leading to nonsensical promises

jokes.text: Sure we didn't overshoot and land in Russia in the 1950s?
jokes.setup: Cold, hostile reception in Helsinki
jokes.punchline: Wondering if they accidentally landed in Stalin-era Russia
jokes.explanation: Good historical reference humor - Selina's tendency to overdramatize situations

jokes.text: They will sell nude pics of their grandmothers for a glass of hot beer.
jokes.setup: Warning about aggressive British reporters
jokes.punchline: Grotesque imagery of selling grandmother's nudes for warm beer
jokes.explanation: Memorably grotesque imagery that captures British tabloid desperation

jokes.text: If Mike were here, we would have spent the entire flight watching him do scratcher lotto tickets going, 'Oh, so close,' every time he lost.
jokes.setup: Discussing how Mike would have handled the situation
jokes.punchline: Specific image of Mike's pathetic gambling habits on flights
jokes.explanation: Perfect character detail - specific, pathetic, and completely believable for Mike

jokes.text: Selina, you looking for 50 ways to leave Helsinki?
jokes.setup: Selina looking frustrated in Helsinki
jokes.punchline: Reference to Paul Simon song '50 Ways to Leave Your Lover'
jokes.explanation: Decent pop culture reference but not particularly inspired - typical Gary trying to lighten mood

jokes.text: Holy shit, grandpa, you probably still get your porn from magazines.
jokes.setup: Jonah mocking Mike's technical incompetence
jokes.punchline: Crude assumption about Mike's porn consumption habits
jokes.explanation: Crude but character-appropriate for Jonah - low-hanging fruit humor

jokes.text: The national security advisor is running around like he's got eagles flying out of his dick.
jokes.setup: Describing someone's frantic behavior
jokes.punchline: Bizarre imagery of eagles emerging from genitals
jokes.explanation: Memorably bizarre metaphor - pure Ben Cafferty colorful imagery that's completely unexpected

jokes.text: All this melodrama really explains your three divorces.
jokes.setup: Response to someone's dramatic behavior
jokes.punchline: Connecting the dramatics to multiple failed marriages
jokes.explanation: Sharp personal attack disguised as observation - Ben's brutal directness

jokes.text: Well, I'd like to divorce your head from your fucking neck.
jokes.setup: Ben's divorce comment
jokes.punchline: Threatening decapitation as a form of 'divorce'
jokes.explanation: Decent comeback with violent imagery - escalating Ben's divorce metaphor

jokes.text: Because with your face, when you attempt to be charming, it really does come off as evil.
jokes.setup: Telling Dan not to make jokes during apology
jokes.punchline: Dan's natural expression makes him look evil when trying to be charming
jokes.explanation: Perfect character insight - Amy's brutal honesty about Dan's unsettling demeanor

jokes.text: It's a small bag. Your hands are large. My dad always said I had lady's hands.
jokes.setup: Gary complaining about bag size
jokes.punchline: Gary's insecurity about his supposedly feminine hands
jokes.explanation: Gary's pathetic insecurities on display - character-consistent self-deprecation

jokes.text: Don't give me that Quaker in a titty bar look.
jokes.setup: Gary giving disapproving look about cigarettes
jokes.punchline: Comparing his expression to a Quaker's shock in a strip club
jokes.explanation: Brilliant specific metaphor - captures exact type of shocked disapproval with vivid imagery

jokes.text: I might be the first woman ever to have parallel periods.
jokes.setup: Feeling like she's on two time zones simultaneously
jokes.punchline: Applying the concept to menstrual cycles
jokes.explanation: Creative application of time zone confusion to female biology - unexpected and specific

jokes.text: Despite your standard-issue hysterical washerwoman reaction, it's really not.
jokes.setup: Someone overreacting to a crisis
jokes.punchline: Dismissing reaction as 'hysterical washerwoman'
jokes.explanation: Ben's characteristically dismissive and slightly antiquated insult style

jokes.text: Like what you had before they made you king of the undead.
jokes.setup: Ben mentioning 'lives'
jokes.punchline: Implying Ben is now undead/vampire-like
jokes.explanation: Creative insult suggesting Ben has become soulless/undead in his role

jokes.text: We're fucked! Bury me!
jokes.setup: Earlier accusation that Ben's crisis management is screaming this
jokes.punchline: Ben immediately proving the point by doing exactly that
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback - Ben immediately validates the criticism by doing exactly what was described

jokes.text: Because no one will feed me?
jokes.setup: Prime Minister saying she'll go fishing when visiting America
jokes.punchline: Selina's dark interpretation that she'd need to fish for food
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina misinterpretation - turning polite gesture into personal slight

jokes.text: And why is it so angry? Because it wants to destroy all of the pigs.
jokes.setup: Selina asking why the Angry Bird is angry
jokes.punchline: Deadpan explanation of the game's violent objective
jokes.explanation: Humor in the earnest explanation of video game violence as diplomatic gift

jokes.text: Finland, you are hefty. That is the wrong word.
jokes.setup: Gift inscription meant to be complimentary
jokes.punchline: Accidentally calling Finland 'hefty' instead of something positive
jokes.explanation: Perfect cringe moment - diplomatic gift gone wrong with unfortunate word choice

jokes.text: Oh, God, you weren't molested by your math teacher, were you?
jokes.setup: Mike hating numbers
jokes.punchline: Jonah's inappropriate speculation about childhood trauma
jokes.explanation: Characteristically inappropriate Jonah comment but relies on shock value over craft

jokes.text: I think I caught it on a plane once.
jokes.setup: Kent explaining Lord of the Rings reference
jokes.punchline: Mike treating it like an in-flight movie he barely watched
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mike response - completely missing Kent's sophisticated metaphor

jokes.text: Are you working as a hatcheck girl now?
jokes.setup: Mike holding coats presumably
jokes.punchline: Ben reducing Mike to menial service role
jokes.explanation: Ben's dismissive view of Mike's competence level

jokes.text: Christ, I hate knowledge.
jokes.setup: Learning about the spy situation complications
jokes.punchline: Mike's existential complaint about being informed
jokes.explanation: Brilliant encapsulation of Mike's character - preferring ignorant bliss to complicated reality

jokes.text: That hasn't happened in Washington since 1835.
jokes.setup: Finnish PM's husband kissing her hand
jokes.punchline: Suggesting Washington hasn't seen courtesy since the 1800s
jokes.explanation: Good political humor about Washington's lack of civility with specific historical date

jokes.text: So that song, unlike your career as communications director, will not die.
jokes.setup: Song controversy continuing
jokes.punchline: Comparing song's persistence to Dan's dead career
jokes.explanation: Sharp Selina putdown - brutal comparison that cuts to Dan's professional inadequacy

jokes.text: Oh, here he comes. Virgin Atlantic.
jokes.setup: Dan approaching to make another apology
jokes.punchline: Comparing him to airline known for British connection and virgin branding
jokes.explanation: Clever reference connecting Dan's British encounter to airline branding

jokes.text: Oh, the tennis player? No. No. I'm joking. I'm joking now.
jokes.setup: Asked about Finnish filmmaker Aki Kaurismaki
jokes.punchline: Confusing with tennis player then awkwardly announcing she was joking
jokes.explanation: Selina's awkward attempt to cover ignorance with failed humor

jokes.text: Danteeksi... 'The Never Ending Sorry.' As opposed to 'story.'
jokes.setup: Explaining the modified Finnish word for sorry
jokes.punchline: Reference to 'Never Ending Story' with wordplay
jokes.explanation: Decent pun about the endless apology cycle with movie reference

jokes.text: Are you on antipsychotics or in Helsinki?
jokes.setup: Ben saying it's 2 PM when Sue thinks it's evening
jokes.punchline: Sue's two explanations for the confusion
jokes.explanation: Classic Sue deadpan wit - treating mental illness and geography as equivalent explanations

jokes.text: I mean, I'm a fucking laughingstock. If you burst into tears, stay away from this dress.
jokes.setup: Selina complaining about constant apologies
jokes.punchline: Caring more about dress than Amy's emotional state
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina priorities - vanity trumping empathy even in crisis

jokes.text: Shall I put her in an iron mask?
jokes.setup: Asked to keep Selina away from press
jokes.punchline: Historical torture device reference
jokes.explanation: Good Amy sarcasm with historical reference. Shows her frustration with impossible demands.

jokes.text: I believe in Finland bag man is kassi.
jokes.setup: Gary being introduced as bag man
jokes.punchline: Innocent mistranslation that will lead to embarrassment
jokes.explanation: Sets up later payoff - innocent linguistic confusion that will become mortifying

jokes.text: Okay, you need to calm the fuck down, Judge Judy.
jokes.setup: Gary being overprotective about smoking
jokes.punchline: Comparing him to aggressive TV judge
jokes.explanation: Decent pop culture comparison for Gary's judgmental behavior. Functional but not inspired.

jokes.text: Cool it, kassi.
jokes.setup: Gary using Finnish word he learned
jokes.punchline: Selina using it back not knowing it means testicles
jokes.explanation: Good setup for later reveal - Selina unknowingly calling Gary 'scrotum'

jokes.text: Less power than the Mayor of Cleveland.
jokes.setup: Selina commenting on his support of PM's career
jokes.punchline: Deflating comparison of Finnish PM to Cleveland mayor
jokes.explanation: Great self-deprecating humor with specific American comparison that lands perfectly

jokes.text: Your Secret Service look about as tough as mine. Shall we get them to fight?
jokes.setup: Casual diplomatic conversation
jokes.punchline: Suggesting their bodyguards engage in combat for entertainment
jokes.explanation: Darkly amusing suggestion delivered casually - sets up Osmo's character

jokes.text: Shall we get them to fight?
jokes.setup: Comparing their Secret Service details
jokes.punchline: Casually suggesting making security fight for entertainment
jokes.explanation: Absurd suggestion delivered matter-of-factly - good deadpan humor

jokes.text: He just squeezed my tit like a balloon.
jokes.setup: Selina explaining what happened
jokes.punchline: Specific, crude comparison of groping to balloon squeezing
jokes.explanation: Crude but effective metaphor - Selina's directness about the assault

jokes.text: He looks like a Disney villain.
jokes.setup: Describing the groper
jokes.punchline: Comparing him to animated Disney villains
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective visual comparison - Gary's childlike perspective

jokes.text: You two have been caught with your balls in grandma's mouth.
jokes.setup: Confronting Kent and Ben about the spy situation
jokes.punchline: Grotesque sexual imagery as metaphor for being caught
jokes.explanation: Memorably disgusting metaphor - Furlong's crude but vivid way of describing their predicament

jokes.text: Screw you and your Confucius grasshopper bullshit, all right?
jokes.setup: Furlong frustrated with Kent's evasiveness
jokes.punchline: Mixing Confucius with Kung Fu TV show reference
jokes.explanation: Decent cultural reference mash-up showing Furlong's frustration with wisdom speak.

jokes.text: Oh, do they know? Laurel and Retardy?
jokes.setup: Mike and Dan entering the room
jokes.punchline: Twisting 'Laurel and Hardy' to include 'Retardy'
jokes.explanation: Crude but effective pun on the classic comedy duo - dismissive of Mike and Dan

jokes.text: Right, Team Fuckup. Yeah, I got my membership card here somewhere. I can't find it.
jokes.setup: Kent saying they're all on the same team
jokes.punchline: Sarcastically agreeing they're Team Fuckup and pretending to look for membership card
jokes.explanation: Good sarcastic extension of the team metaphor with physical comedy element

jokes.text: This is at least 10 years of Oliver Stone movies. Yeah, not the good ones. Not 'Platoon.'
jokes.setup: Describing scandal as material for conspiracy films
jokes.punchline: Clarifying it would be Stone's bad political paranoia films
jokes.explanation: Smart pop culture reference distinguishing between Stone's good and bad periods

jokes.text: Seriously, when you pulled the pin out, you're supposed to throw the grenade away. You don't stick it up your own freakin' ass.
jokes.setup: Criticizing Kent's handling of the situation
jokes.punchline: Extending grenade metaphor to self-destruction via anal insertion
jokes.explanation: Crude but effective metaphor for self-sabotage - escalates the military imagery absurdly

jokes.text: I apologized less after I banged my brother's fiancée.
jokes.setup: Complaining about having to apologize so much
jokes.punchline: Comparison to serious family betrayal requiring fewer apologies
jokes.explanation: Shocking personal revelation used for comparison - perfectly captures Amy's cynical worldview

jokes.text: That's like a sexual 9/11 in my opinion. Or a sexual Cuban Missile Crisis at the least.
jokes.setup: Describing the groping as attack on America
jokes.punchline: Comparing sexual assault to major historical crises
jokes.explanation: Characteristically inappropriate Dan escalation - absurd historical comparisons for personal slight

jokes.text: Because of the axis of dick.
jokes.setup: Explaining why they can't tell Kent about the grope
jokes.punchline: Playing on 'Axis of Evil' to describe male-dominated power structure
jokes.explanation: Brilliant political wordplay - transforms Bush-era foreign policy term into feminist observation

jokes.text: In America we actually call fish chicken of the sea.
jokes.setup: Being told they're eating chicken
jokes.punchline: Confusing tuna's marketing slogan with general fish terminology
jokes.explanation: Selina's typical cultural confusion - misapplying advertising slogan as educational fact

jokes.text: In America we actually call fish chicken of the sea.
jokes.setup: Eating chicken but thinking it's fish
jokes.punchline: Confidently explaining American tuna marketing as if it's profound
jokes.explanation: Good diplomatic awkwardness - Selina trying to sound cultured while confused

jokes.text: It is a testicle container. Oh, no. Don't feel ashamed, Gary. Because, of course, you're not a ball sack.
jokes.setup: Gary's earlier introduction as 'kassi'
jokes.punchline: Revealing the crude meaning while trying to be reassuring
jokes.explanation: Perfect payoff to earlier setup - maximum embarrassment delivered with Finnish politeness

jokes.text: You're career poison. Do you know that? Jesus, that's why you like sailing, because you're a fucking anchor dragging promising careers down to the bottom of the fucking ocean.
jokes.setup: Mike accidentally sending sensitive polling data
jokes.punchline: Extended metaphor of Mike as anchor destroying careers at sea
jokes.explanation: Brilliant extended metaphor - connects Mike's hobby to his professional destructiveness perfectly

jokes.text: Was that up in the hills or down in the valley?
jokes.setup: Being told about Selina being groped
jokes.punchline: Kent asking about anatomical specifics with geographic metaphors
jokes.explanation: Perfectly inappropriate Kent response - treating sexual assault as data point with crude euphemisms

jokes.text: Was that up in the hills or down in the valley?
jokes.setup: Learning about Selina being groped
jokes.punchline: Asking for anatomical specifics
jokes.explanation: Ben's inappropriate curiosity about assault details. Character-appropriate but crude.

jokes.text: And you raped my tit. So I'm coming for you 'cause I'm an Angry Bird right now... and you're a pig.
jokes.setup: Earlier Angry Birds gift exchange
jokes.punchline: Selina using the game metaphor to threaten her groper
jokes.explanation: Masterful callback - transforms diplomatic gift into personal vendetta threat with perfect metaphor

jokes.text: Well, who knew that being sexually assaulted wouldn't be the worst thing to happen in my day, huh?
jokes.setup: Reflecting on terrible day with spy scandal
jokes.punchline: Sexual assault ranking below other political disasters
jokes.explanation: Devastatingly dark humor - captures how political crises can dwarf personal trauma in Washington

jokes.text: I mean, would it be so hard for people not to be assholes? I wouldn't know.
jokes.setup: Selina's existential question about human decency
jokes.punchline: Amy's deadpan admission she doesn't know about not being an asshole
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Amy's brutal self-awareness delivered with perfect timing

jokes.text: 57 Twitter followers. That's shit for a journalist.
jokes.setup: Looking up the annoying British reporter
jokes.punchline: Judging journalist's credibility by social media metrics
jokes.explanation: Good modern media humor - reducing professional credibility to follower count

jokes.text: 57 Twitter followers. That's shit for a journalist. Yeah.
jokes.setup: Researching the British reporter who bothered them
jokes.punchline: Using social media metrics to dismiss journalistic credibility
jokes.explanation: Good modern metric for dismissing someone - relatable social media shame

jokes.text: Europe used to be my favorite continent. Now it's not even in my top five.
jokes.setup: Bad experience in Helsinki
jokes.punchline: Ranking continents like a personal preference list
jokes.explanation: Absurd personalization of geopolitics - treating continents like restaurant rankings
